title: Marathon Chicken Bake
summary: A hearty one-pan chicken bake from Lizzii's cookbook. Perfect for meal prep or feeding a crowd.
instructions: Cut potatoes into wedges and toss with olive oil, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Arrange chicken thighs skin-side up in a large baking dish.
Scatter potato wedges and sliced onion around the chicken.
Tuck garlic cloves and rosemary sprigs between the pieces.
Bake for 45 minutes until chicken skin is golden and crispy.
